2604.11784.title: ClawGUI: A Unified Framework for Training, Evaluating, and Deploying GUI Agents
2604.11784.paper_summary: GUI agents drive applications through their visual interfaces instead of programmatic APIs, interacting with arbitrary software via taps, swipes, and keystrokes, reaching a long tail of applications that CLI-based agents cannot. Yet progress in this area is bottlenecked less by modeling capacity than by the absence of a coherent full-stack infrastructure: online RL training suffers from environment instability and closed pipelines, evaluation protocols drift silently across works, and trained agents rarely reach real users on real devices. We present \textbf{ClawGUI}, an open-source framework addressing these three gaps within a single harness. \textbf{ClawGUI-RL} provides the first open-source GUI agent RL infrastructure with validated support for both parallel virtual environments and real physical devices, integrating GiGPO with a Process Reward Model for dense step-level supervision. \textbf{ClawGUI-Eval} enforces a fully standardized evaluation pipeline across 6 benchmarks and 11+ models, achieving 95.8\% reproduction against official baselines. \textbf{ClawGUI-Agent} brings trained agents to Android, HarmonyOS, and iOS through 12+ chat platforms with hybrid CLI-GUI control and persistent personalized memory. Trained end to end within this pipeline, \textbf{ClawGUI-2B} achieves 17.1\% Success Rate on MobileWorld GUI-Only, outperforming the same-scale MAI-UI-2B baseline by 6.0\%.
2604.11784.paper_summary_zh: GUI代理透過其視覺介面驅動應用程式，而不是透過程式化API，通過點擊、滑動和鍵入與任意軟體互動，達到CLI基礎代理無法觸及的長尾應用程式。然而，這方面的進展受限於缺乏一致的全棧基礎設施，而非建模能力：線上強化學習訓練受到環境不穩定和封閉管道的困擾，評估協議在各項工作中靜默漂移，且訓練過的代理很少能在真實設備上接觸到真實用戶。我們提出了\textbf{ClawGUI}，這是一個開源框架，旨在解決這三個缺口，並將其整合在單一的系統中。\textbf{ClawGUI-RL}提供了首個開源GUI代理強化學習基礎設施，經過驗證支持平行虛擬環境和真實物理設備，並將GiGPO與過程獎勵模型整合，以實現密集的步驟級監督。\textbf{ClawGUI-Eval}在6個基準和11個以上模型之間強制實施完全標準化的評估管道，達到95.8\%的重現率，對應官方基準。\textbf{ClawGUI-Agent}通過12個以上的聊天平台，將訓練過的代理帶入Android、HarmonyOS和iOS，並具備混合CLI-GUI控制和持久的個性化記憶。在這個管道中端到端訓練的\textbf{ClawGUI-2B}在MobileWorld GUI-Only上達到了17.1\%的成功率，超越同規模的MAI-UI-2B基準6.0\%。
2604.11784.author: Fei Tang et.al.
2604.11784.authors: Fei Tang, Zhiqiong Lu, Boxuan Zhang, Weiming Lu, Jun Xiao, Yueting Zhuang, Yongliang Shen
